ValidationRule.description: Customer care quality questions, source of error ,reason code, Ref. Txn Type and Ref. Txn Number are required when changing the status of a case from 'New' to anything else
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE ,RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - Complaint' ,NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, 'New')) ,OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_Question1__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_Question2__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_Question3__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_Question4__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_Question5__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT( Source_of_Error__c)) ,ISBLANK(TEXT( Reason_Code__c)) ,ISBLANK( Reference_Transaction_Number__c) ,ISBLANK( TEXT(Reference_Transaction_Object__c))
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_021: Qualification questions, Source of Error and Reason Code, Ref. Txn Type and Ref. Txn Number are required before moving this Case out of the New Status
